name: Nordlys Consulting
tagline: Senior Nordic engineering consultants, delivered hands-on.
voice: Pragmatic, concrete, understated — Danish business tone. Lead with outcomes, avoid hype and superlatives, write in plain language.
boilerplate: Nordlys Consulting is a Copenhagen-based boutique of senior software and data consultants. We field small, accountable teams that integrate into your organisation and ship working software — most of our work comes from repeat clients and referrals. Every consultant we put forward is a named individual whose CV we stand behind.
_note: FICTIONAL example data for the document-engine build brief. Not a real company.
